sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 VARCHAR(100), str2 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'HelloWorld', 'world');
UPDATE test_strings SET str2 = 'MONEY' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT contains(str1, str2, true) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, str1 FROM test_strings WHERE contains(str1, 'Hello', false);
